# Booking SvelteKit LLM Guide

Purpose: guide agents implementing or customizing the `booking-sveltekit` template.

## Read First

- `microservices.template.json`
- `microservices.config.json`
- `microservices.lock.json`
- `README.agent.md`
- root `docs/templates/booking-sveltekit.md`

## Architecture Rule

SvelteKit route files are adapters. Domain/API logic lives in detached use cases.

```txt
src/routes/api/bookings/+server.ts
  -> parse request and call createBooking

modules/booking/src/use-cases/create-booking.ts
  -> domain orchestration

modules/customer/src/use-cases/upsert-customer.ts
  -> customer create/update behavior used by booking

modules/booking/src/adapters/d1-booking-repository.ts
  -> Cloudflare D1 booking persistence

modules/customer/src/adapters/d1-customer-repository.ts
  -> Cloudflare D1 customer persistence
```

## Approval Gates

Require user approval before changing:

- secrets
- remote migrations
- webhooks
- payment/email provider behavior
- Cloudflare resources
- remote deployments
- forked module internals

Local baseline commands may apply the checked-in D1 migrations to Wrangler's local database:

```bash
pnpm microservices local migrate
pnpm microservices local dev
pnpm microservices local smoke
```
